title: Who needs data centers in space when they can float offshore?
summary: Aikido, an offshore wind developer, plans to deploy a data center beneath a floating offshore wind turbine this year, combining renewable energy generation with computational infrastructure.
content: Offshore wind developer Aikido will deploy a small data center beneath a floating offshore wind turbine later this year.

zh.title: 谁说数据中心必须在太空？它们也能漂浮在海上
zh.summary: 离岸风电开发商Aikido计划今年在浮动离岸风力涡轮机下部署数据中心，结合可再生能源发电和计算基础设施。

fr.title: Qui a besoin de centres de données dans l'espace quand ils peuvent flotter au large?
fr.summary: Aikido, un développeur d'énergie éolienne offshore, prévoit de déployer un centre de données sous une turbine éolienne offshore flottante cette année, combinant la génération d'énergie renouvelable avec l'infrastructure informatique.

de.title: Wer braucht Rechenzentren im Weltall, wenn sie auf dem Meer schwimmen können?
de.summary: Aikido, ein Entwickler von Windkraft auf dem Meer, plant, in diesem Jahr ein Rechenzentrum unter einer schwimmenden Offshore-Windturbine einzusetzen und kombiniert damit erneuerbare Energieerzeugung mit Recheninfrastruktur.

es.title: ¿Quién necesita centros de datos en el espacio cuando pueden flotar en alta mar?
es.summary: Aikido, un desarrollador de energía eólica marina, planea desplegar un centro de datos bajo una turbina eólica marina flotante este año, combinando la generación de energía renovable con la infraestructura computacional.

title: How a prize-winning cartoonist brings hand-drawn comics to the web
summary: American journalist Danny Fenster, imprisoned for six months during Myanmar's 2021 coup, has collaborated with cartoonist Amy Kurzweil on an interactive comic for The Verge documenting his experience.
content:
Jailed during the 2021 coup in Myanmar, American journalist Danny Fenster spent six months as a political prisoner. For much of his incarceration he battled boredom and fear, subsisting on meditation and podcasts on an SD card smuggled in by mail, sent by his girlfriend, Juliana. 
Now, nearly five years after his release, he collaborated with his cousin Amy Kurzweil, a celebrated New Yorker cartoonist and graphic memoirist, on a long-form interactive comic for The Verge about his imprisonment. I chatted via email with Kurzweil about her role as an illustrator and storyteller in this ambitious long-form project, the responsibilities inherent …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 获奖漫画家如何将手绘漫画带上网络
zh.summary: 美国记者丹尼·芬斯特在缅甸2021年军事政变期间被监禁六个月，现已与漫画家艾米·库兹韦尔合作为《The Verge》创作互动漫画，记录他的经历。

fr.title: Comment une cartooniste primée apporte ses bandes dessinées dessinées à la main au web
fr.summary: Le journaliste américain Danny Fenster, emprisonné pendant six mois lors du coup d'État de 2021 au Myanmar, a collaboré avec la cartooniste Amy Kurzweil sur une bande dessinée interactive pour The Verge documentant son expérience.

de.title: Wie eine preisgekrönte Cartoonistin handgezeichnete Comics ins Web bringt
de.summary: Der amerikanische Journalist Danny Fenster, der während des Militärputschs 2021 in Myanmar sechs Monate lang inhaftiert war, hat mit der Cartoonistin Amy Kurzweil an einem interaktiven Comic für The Verge zusammengearbeitet, der seine Erfahrung dokumentiert.

es.title: Cómo un cartonista premiado lleva cómics dibujados a mano a la web
es.summary: El periodista estadounidense Danny Fenster, encarcelado durante seis meses durante el golpe de estado de 2021 en Myanmar, ha colaborado con la caricaturista Amy Kurzweil en un cómic interactivo para The Verge que documenta su experiencia.

title: I’m not ashamed to admit the Kobo Remote is the best gadget I’ve bought this year
summary: Kobo released a $30 wireless remote for its e-readers, providing convenient Bluetooth page-turning without modifications or clip-on attachments, addressing the wireless control gap in the e-reader market.
content:
The Kobo Remote is small and lightweight, but large enough to be comfortable to hold.	

Does anyone really need a remote for a device you’re already either holding or using at arm’s length? E-readers have saved us from the risk of paper cuts and the burden of physically turning pages, but Kobo is making it even easier by releasing a wireless page-turning remote. The Kobo Remote might be indulgent and basic, but it’s all about maximizing convenience, and at the end of the night when I’m looking to unwind with a good book, that’s exactly what I want.
Wireless remotes for e-readers aren’t a new idea, but none of them just directly connect to Kindles and Kobos, despite recent versions of those e-readers now supporting Bluetooth. You either need to jump through hoops to modify the software on your e-reader to make it connect to specific third-party remotes, or settle for a remotely operated accessory that attaches to an e-reader and physically taps the screen to turn the page.
Clip-on page turners have always felt too cumbersome and complicated to me. I’m probably not alone, because shortly after it launched last November, the $30 Kobo Remote quickly sold out and remained out of stock for several months. It wasn’t until late January that I was finally able to buy one, and while I think Kobo could have squeezed in a little more functionality, both my wife and I have readily embraced the remote.
At just shy of 4 inches long and about the size of a pack of Juicy Fruit, the Kobo Remote is a lot smaller than I was expecting. It feels even smaller in my large hands, but at the same time big enough to comfortably hold and operate, and to not get lost in the bedsheets if dropped. The remote includes an optional wrist lanyard, which on more than one occasion has prevented it from going missing when I’ve fallen asleep reading.
There’s no rechargeable battery, but Kobo says the included AAA should last for months. The remote will only connect to Kobo devices that support Bluetooth

zh.title: 我不羞愧地承认Kobo Remote是我今年买的最好的小工具
zh.summary: Kobo发布了一款30美元的无线遥控器，用于其电子阅读器，提供便捷的蓝牙翻页功能，无需修改或夹式附件，解决了电子阅读器市场中的无线控制空白。

fr.title: Je ne suis pas honteux d'admettre que la télécommande Kobo est le meilleur gadget que j'ai acheté cette année
fr.summary: Kobo a lancé une télécommande sans fil de 30 $ pour ses liseuses, offrant un changement de page Bluetooth confortable sans modifications ni pièces jointes à clip, comblant le vide de contrôle sans fil sur le marché des liseuses.

de.title: Ich schäme mich nicht, zuzugeben, dass die Kobo Remote das beste Gadget ist, das ich dieses Jahr gekauft habe
de.summary: Kobo veröffentlichte eine 30-Dollar-Funkfernbedienung für seine E-Reader, die bequemes Bluetooth-Umblättern ohne Änderungen oder Clip-on-Befestigungen bietet und die Lücke der drahtlosen Steuerung auf dem E-Reader-Markt adressiert.

es.title: No me avergüenza admitir que el Kobo Remote es el mejor gadget que he comprado este año
es.summary: Kobo lanzó un control remoto inalámbrico de $30 para sus lectores electrónicos, que proporciona cambio de página Bluetooth conveniente sin modificaciones ni accesorios de clip, abordando la brecha de control inalámbrico en el mercado de lectores electrónicos.

title: Eight Sleep raises $50M at $1.5B valuation
summary: Eight Sleep secured $50 million in funding at a $1.5 billion valuation while achieving free-cash-flow positive status in 2025, planning to expand products and markets.
content: Eight Sleep said it was free-cash-flow positive in 2025, and plans to use the new funding for new products, global expansions, and clinical validation.

zh.title: Eight Sleep以15亿美元估值融资5000万美元
zh.summary: Eight Sleep以15亿美元估值融资5000万美元，并在2025年实现正自由现金流，计划扩展产品和市场。

fr.title: Eight Sleep lève 50 millions de dollars à une valorisation de 1,5 milliard
fr.summary: Eight Sleep a levé 50 millions de dollars à une valorisation de 1,5 milliard et a atteint un flux de trésorerie libre positif en 2025, envisageant d'élargir ses produits et marchés.

de.title: Eight Sleep sammelt 50 Millionen Dollar bei einer Bewertung von 1,5 Milliarden ein
de.summary: Eight Sleep hat 50 Millionen Dollar bei einer Bewertung von 1,5 Milliarden eingesammelt und erreichte 2025 einen positiven freien Cashflow, mit Plänen zur Erweiterung von Produkten und Märkten.

es.title: Eight Sleep recauda $50 millones a una valoración de $1.5 mil millones
es.summary: Eight Sleep obtuvo $50 millones en financiamiento a una valoración de $1.5 mil millones y logró un flujo de caja libre positivo en 2025, planeando expandir productos y mercados.

title: Inside the secret meeting that led to the AI political resistance
summary: A secret January conference in New Orleans brought together 90 diverse political and thought leaders across ideological lines to address artificial intelligence policy concerns.
content:
From left: Randi Weingarten, Steve Bannon, and Ralph Nader. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

In early January, a group of 90 or so political, community and thought leaders gathered in a New Orleans Marriott for a secret conference on artificial intelligence - so secret, in fact, that no one knew who else had been invited until they walked into the room.  Church leaders and conservative academics were sitting next to labor union representatives. Progressive power brokers who'd drafted Bernie Sanders to run for president suddenly found themselves breathing the same air as MAGA talking heads. And the AI thought leaders who'd invited them to New Orleans were hoping that none of them would kill each other.
On Wednesday, the Future of Li …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 揭秘导致人工智能政治抵抗的秘密会议
zh.summary: 一场1月在新奥尔良举行的秘密会议汇集了90位不同政治和思想领袖，跨越意识形态分歧，共同讨论人工智能政策问题。

fr.title: À l'intérieur de la réunion secrète qui a conduit à la résistance politique à l'IA
fr.summary: Une conférence secrète en janvier à la Nouvelle-Orléans a réuni 90 leaders politiques et de pensée divers à travers les lignes idéologiques pour aborder les préoccupations concernant la politique de l'IA.

de.title: Einblick in das geheime Treffen, das zum politischen Widerstand gegen KI führte
de.summary: Eine geheime Konferenz im Januar in New Orleans brachte 90 verschiedene politische und Gedankenführer über ideologische Grenzen hinweg zusammen, um Bedenken zur künstlichen Intelligenzpolitik zu besprechen.

es.title: Dentro de la reunión secreta que llevó a la resistencia política de la IA
es.summary: Una conferencia secreta en enero en Nueva Orleans reunió a 90 líderes políticos y de pensamiento diversos a través de líneas ideológicas para abordar preocupaciones de política de IA.

title: Activision silences trusted Call of Duty leaker
summary: Activision issued a cease-and-desist to TheGhostOfHope, a trusted Call of Duty leaker, forcing him to stop sharing confidential information about the gaming franchise.
content:
One of the most trusted leakers for Call of Duty will no longer share confidential information about the gaming franchise after being hit with a cease and desist order. TheGhostOfHope (also known to the community as "Hope") announced on X that he is complying with legal demands from developer Activision to "stop leaking and disseminating confidential information related to Call of Duty/Activision."
"Still gonna stick around and chat about Official Call of Duty info and anything not related to leaks/confidential information," Hope said. "Cheers for these past few years."
Hope gained a reputation for sharing reliable information about past,  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 动视暴雪让可信任的《使命召唤》泄密者沉默
zh.summary: 动视暴雪向可信任的《使命召唤》泄密者TheGhostOfHope发出了禁止令，迫使他停止分享有关这款游戏特许经营权的机密信息。

fr.title: Activision réduit au silence le fuyard de confiance de Call of Duty
fr.summary: Activision a adressé une mise en demeure à TheGhostOfHope, un fuyard de confiance de Call of Duty, le forçant à cesser de partager des informations confidentielles sur la franchise de jeu.

de.title: Activision bringt vertrauenswürdigen Call of Duty-Leaker zum Schweigen
de.summary: Activision richtete eine Unterlassungsanordnung gegen TheGhostOfHope, einen vertrauenswürdigen Call of Duty-Leaker, und zwang ihn, die Weitergabe vertraulicher Informationen über die Gaming-Franchise zu unterlassen.

es.title: Activision silencia al filtrador de confianza de Call of Duty
es.summary: Activision emitió una demanda de cese y desistimiento a TheGhostOfHope, un filtrador de confianza de Call of Duty, obligándolo a dejar de compartir información confidencial sobre la franquicia de videojuegos.

title: Why AI startups are selling the same equity at two different prices
summary: Some AI founders are using novel valuation mechanisms to artificially inflate company valuations and achieve unicorn status by selling identical equity at different prices. This pricing discrepancy allows startups to manipulate market perception without changing actual company fundamentals.
content: Some AI founders are using a novel valuation mechanism to manufacture unicorn status.

zh.title: 为什么AI初创公司以两种不同的价格出售相同的股权
zh.summary: 一些AI创始人正在使用新颖的估值机制，通过以不同的价格出售相同的股权来人为地夸大公司估值，从而实现独角兽地位。这种定价差异允许初创公司在不改变实际公司基本面的情况下操纵市场认知。

fr.title: Pourquoi les startups d'IA vendent les mêmes actions à deux prix différents
fr.summary: Certains fondateurs d'IA utilisent des mécanismes d'évaluation novateurs pour gonfler artificiellement les évaluations d'entreprise et atteindre le statut de licorne en vendant des actions identiques à des prix différents. Cet écart de prix permet aux startups de manipuler la perception du marché sans modifier les fondamentaux réels de l'entreprise.

de.title: Warum KI-Startups die gleichen Aktien zu zwei verschiedenen Preisen verkaufen
de.summary: Einige KI-Gründer nutzen neuartige Bewertungsmechanismen, um Unternehmensbewertungen künstlich aufzublähen und den Einhornstatus zu erreichen, indem sie identische Aktien zu unterschiedlichen Preisen verkaufen. Diese Preisdiskrepanz ermöglicht es Startups, die Marktwahrnehmung zu manipulieren, ohne die tatsächlichen Unternehmensfundamente zu verändern.

es.title: Por qué las startups de IA venden el mismo capital a dos precios diferentes
es.summary: Algunos fundadores de IA están utilizando mecanismos de valoración novedosos para inflar artificialmente las valoraciones de empresas y lograr el estado de unicornio vendiendo acciones idénticas a precios diferentes. Esta discrepancia de precios permite a las startups manipular la percepción del mercado sin cambiar los fundamentos reales de la empresa.
